story: At the baths party by the lake, she saw Felix flanked by Nicole and Daniela. Jealous, she swam and left him to them. Next morning Nicole bragged, “He drove me home.” Around noon an email came: Felix wrote that it was a pity she’d only looked in briefly and asked her to dinner, adding that she had worn the most beautiful dress. After the party, Felix had actually left alone and asked the excavation boss for her address so he could invite her properly.
implausible_knowledge: After the party, Felix had actually left alone and asked the excavation boss for her address so he could invite her properly.
question: Right after reading Felix’s email inviting her to dinner, what will she most plausibly do?
answer_with_knowledge: Accept the invitation and agree to dinner.
answer_without_knowledge: Decline and tell him she’s too busy to mess around.
